reference: I have a lump under my ear on my neck that has been there for the last three days. I felt the pain only when it first appeared, but since then there has been no pain. Last night, another lump was found just a few centimeters away from it. Now, I want to ask what this lump could be and whether it is viral or bacterial. Moreover, what medicine should I use?
text: I have a number in my journal that matches the last name Davis. I hope that you know what it refers to. You found her address also? That's right, another month ago Mr. Eason gave it away. How about Mr. Smith?
